name: American Bank And Trust Company
description_short: Oklahoma-based community bank offering personal and commercial checking, savings, CDs, IRAs, loans, and trust services since 1971.
description_long:
American Bank and Trust Company was chartered in Oklahoma in 1971 by W.K. Warren Sr. under the name American Bank of Tulsa. The institution expanded its offerings in 1983 when it was granted trust powers and adopted its current name. The bank operates as a traditional community bank with a stated philosophy of providing personalized, one-on-one customer relationships rather than competing on scale.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of financial services across personal and commercial banking. Personal customers can access checking and savings accounts, CDs and IRAs, and personal loans. Commercial clients have access to checking, savings, CDs, cash management services, trade finance, and commercial loans. Additional services include trust services, bill pay (both personal and commercial), telephone banking via touch-tone teller, ATM/check cards with Visa functionality, remote deposit capture, safe deposit boxes, cashiers checks, wire transfers, and coin counting services.

American Bank and Trust distinguishes itself through emphasis on personal relationships and community presence. The bank maintains multiple physical locations with posted hours, ATM networks accessible at over 400,000 worldwide locations via TransFund and CIRRUS networks, and dedicated customer service phone lines. Their remote deposit capture service allows business customers to deposit checks electronically from their offices.

As a regional community bank, American Bank and Trust is best suited for customers prioritizing local relationships and personalized service over digital-first banking. The institution appears to focus on Oklahoma-based customers given its Tulsa headquarters and website domain. Customers should note that the website copyright shows 2010, suggesting the online presence may not reflect current offerings or technology standards. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
pros: Multiple physical locations in Oklahoma with posted hours and personalized service model
Wide ATM access through 400,000+ worldwide locations via TransFund and CIRRUS networks
Remote deposit capture available for business customers to deposit checks electronically
Comprehensive service offerings including trust services, commercial loans, and trade finance
Touch-tone telephone banking available 24/7 for account inquiries and fund transfers
Both personal and commercial bill pay options available through online banking
ATM/check card functions as both debit card (Visa) and ATM access device
cons: Website copyright dated 2010 suggests outdated digital presence and potentially legacy technology
No mention of mobile banking, mobile app, or modern digital-first features
Bill pay fees apply ($4.95/month for first 15 payments plus per-transaction charges)
Limited online information available; many service details require phone contact at 918-481-3000
Regional institution appears focused on Oklahoma customers; unclear if services available nationally

contact.address: 6060 S American Plaza St E, Tulsa, OK 74135

best_for: Oklahoma-based business owners seeking commercial banking and trade finance services
Customers who value in-person relationships and local community banking over digital convenience
Personal loan borrowers and savers who prefer working with a regional institution
Trust and estate planning clients needing dedicated trust services
diagnosis: American Bank and Trust Company is best for Oklahoma-based customers—both personal and business—who prioritize personalized service and community relationships over cutting-edge digital banking. The main caveat is that this appears to be a traditional, brick-and-mortar regional bank with an outdated web presence; customers seeking modern mobile banking, fintech features, or national availability should look elsewhere.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 6060 S American Plaza St E, Tulsa, OK 74135
